name: bug
description: Something is not working as expected.

name: feature
description: New product functionality or an improvement request.

name: docs
description: Documentation, copy, guides, or README changes.

name: design
description: Product, interaction, or visual design discussion.

name: refactor
description: Code restructuring without intended behavior changes.

name: test
description: Tests or test configuration.

name: chore
description: Repo maintenance or internal-only work.

name: area:web
description: Next.js web app changes.

name: area:ui
description: Interface, layout, accessibility, or component changes.

name: area:docs
description: Documentation and project guidance.

name: area:ai
description: Eve, agent behavior, prompts, models, or AI guardrails.

name: area:demo
description: Hackathon demo flow, pitch support, or seeded demo state.

name: area:supabase
description: Supabase schema, SQL, RLS, storage, or client helpers.

name: area:ci
description: GitHub Actions, release automation, or repo automation.

name: area:dependencies
description: Dependency updates.

name: needs reproduction
description: Needs a minimal reproduction before it can move forward.

name: needs maintainer decision
description: Needs product or technical direction from the maintainer.

name: needs design review
description: Needs product, UX, or visual review before implementation.

name: ready for review
description: Ready for maintainer review.

name: blocked
description: Cannot move forward until a dependency or decision clears.

name: good first issue
description: Approachable for a first contribution.

name: help wanted
description: Maintainers would welcome community help.
